extract: Sprigatito (Japanese: ニャオハ Nyahoja) is a Grass-type Pokémon introduced in Generation IX. It evolves into Floragato starting at level 16, which evolves into Meowscarada starting at level 36. Along with Fuecoco and Quaxly, Sprigatito is one of the three first partner Pokémon of Paldea available at the beginning of Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. They were also the first Generation IX Pokémon to be revealed to the public on February 27, 2022, through a Pokémon Presents video presentation.
